bazaarutils.config.chat.category.descrip: Configurations for the chat features of the mod
bazaarutils.config.chat.useless_bazaar_n: Enables to remove some of the transient messages sent to the chat by the Bazaar when interacting with it.
The list of transient messages/notifications to be excluded/unallowed from the chat
bazaarutils.config.chat.stash_messages_r: Enables to remove the messages sent to the chat remembering to pick up your stash.
bazaarutils.config.buttons.category.desc: Configurations for the buttons to be injected/handled by the mod
bazaarutils.config.buttons.separator.mod: Register buttons to inventory screens to quick access/manage features.
bazaarutils.config.buttons.mod_buttons.d: Global toggle for whether any Mod Buttons will be registered.
bazaarutils.config.buttons.open_settings: Adds a button to selected menus/screen to quick access the mods' settings.
bazaarutils.config.buttons.open_orders.d: Adds a button to selected menus/screen to quick access your orders page.
effect active in order to function.
bazaarutils.config.buttons.button:widget: Whether the button will be registered or not
bazaarutils.config.buttons.separator.con: Register buttons in selected containers to act as helpers relevant to the screen.
bazaarutils.config.buttons.cancel_order_: Adds a button to an unfilled orders' (or offer) settings page to cancel it and search once again the item.
bazaarutils.config.buttons.bookmarks.sep: Item Bookmarks are a feature which allows to quick search selected items onto the Bazaar.
bazaarutils.config.buttons.bookmarks.ope: Configures the button that appears on selected menus/screen to quick search the relevant bookmark.
bazaarutils.config.buttons.bookmarks.tog: Adds a button to an items' page to toggle a quick access button to search the same item on the Bazaar.
bazaarutils.config.buttons.button:contai: Whether the button will be registered or not
The container slot where the button will be registered at

bazaarutils.config.inventory.order_statu: Highlights the status of your Bazaar Orders by colouring their item of a representative color.
The color to highlight orders which are the best offer to the market.
The color to highlight orders which match the market price.
The color to highlight orders which are below the market price.
bazaarutils.config.overlays.category.des: Configurations for the overlays to be created by the mod
bazaarutils.config.overlays.price_charts: Injects a link to every Bazaar Items' tooltip to quick access relevant market charts.
Whether to render the charts on tooltips when outside of a Bazaar screen.
bazaarutils.config.overlays.bazaar_limit: Adds informational text to Bazaar Screens about the status of your daily Bazaar Limits.
The Bazaar limits each profile to order/offer tradeables for up to 15,000,000,000.00 coins each day.
bazaarutils.config.notifications.categor: Configurations for the notifications to be pushed by the mod
bazaarutils.config.notifications.order_n: Enables functions to produce different types of notifications, related to the status of your orders.
Configure the notification to be produced when an order/offer of yours is outbidded.
Configure the notification to be produced when an order/offer of yours is filled.
bazaarutils.config.notifications.notific: Whether the notification will be produced or not
bazaarutils.config.developer.category.de: Developer configurations & toggleable tools of the mod
bazaarutils.config.developer.enabled.des: Global toggle for all developer related functionalities/utilities.
bazaarutils.config.developer.debug_messa: Configure the messages or notifications pushed to the chat about routines & the state of the mod
